name: Baked Chicken with Red-Peppered Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken on the oiled rack of a large broiler pan.
2. Sprinkle the chicken with lemon pepper.
3. Bake at 400°F, skin side up, for about 50 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
4. Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a large non-stick frying pan over medium temperature.
5. Add onions and cook until barely wilted, about 5 minutes.
6. Add jelly and stir gently until melted.
7. Spoon half of the onion mixture onto a large platter.
8. Arrange the chicken over the onions; top with remaining onions.
9. Garnish with pepper rings and cilantro.
